summary: Recording source unknown, but the show is a fun mix of brilliant and shabby moments with standout Playing in the Band > Uncle John’s Band combo.
review: The performance offers an enjoyable blend of high points and weaker spots, highlighted by the early‑80s energy of the Playing in the Band into Uncle John's Band sequence. No specific recording details are mentioned, so the audio quality cannot be assessed from these reviews.

ai_rating.rationale: Only two brief reviews; one moderately positive (3 stars) and one with no rating, offering mixed impressions of the show and no recording comments.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers did not comment on soundboard vs. audience or clarity; no technical observations provided.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers note that the classic Playing in the Band > Uncle John's Band pairing is present, though not arranged in the reverse order some fans prefer.
